IDirect3DDevice8::EndScene

This method performs no operation for the Xbox game system. It has been retained solely to allow easier porting of existing code.

HRESULT EndScene();

Requirements

  Header: Declared in D3d8.h.
  Import Library: Use D3d8.lib.

See Also

IDirect3DDevice8::BeginScene
